item.title: Silent catch block audit for src/config/ module
item.intent: No error in src/config/ is silently discarded. Config parse, schema validation, and file read failures must be observable without enabling debug mode.
item.description: The systematic silent-catch sweep (BUG-012 through BUG-019, BUG-021) covered evolve/, operate/, build/, secure/, design/, cloud/, gateway/, and cli/. The src/config/ module was not included. BUG-016 fixed a specific process.env.HOME issue in config/paths.ts but was not a general silent-catch sweep. Config module files to audit: defaults.ts, paths.ts, validate.ts, loader.ts, types.ts — any silent catches here would hide config parse failures, schema validation errors, or file read problems that are critical to every command. Steps: (1) search src/config/ for 'catch {' and 'catch (_' patterns; (2) for each non-fatal catch, add console.warn() with error and context; (3) do NOT convert non-fatal catches to throws — keep fallback behaviour; (4) run config/ tests to confirm no regression. Scope: likely 2-5 additions, low risk.
